name: elevenlabs_list_voices
description: List the ElevenLabs voices available in this account: the user's own/cloned/designed voices ('My Voices') and the premade/library voices. Use when the user asks what voices they have, which voice to use, or to confirm a clone/design landed in their voice selector.
returns: A summary of My Voices (name + elevenlabs:<id>) and the count of premade voices; full lists in data.
notes: Reads the live ElevenLabs catalog (cached). No key configured -> reports there are no voices available.
